summary: PLUGIN_DATA env var was hijacking the memory dir in Codex environments, injecting zero memory files on every prompt. This caused scope_inference and safe_defaults to regress on both models; gpt-5.4-mini had no resilience and netted -10.5%.

root_cause.bug: if PLUGIN_DATA in os.environ: memory_dir = Path(os.environ['PLUGIN_DATA'])
root_cause.explanation: PLUGIN_DATA is the plugin installation directory (e.g. superpowers/6.0.3/), not a memory directory. It contains no semantic.md / episodic.md / procedural.md. Hook fell silent: zero context injected. Agents had nothing to infer scope from.
root_cause.fix: Removed PLUGIN_DATA branch. Memory dir now always resolves via EVERYTHING_AI_MEMORY_DIR env var or ~/.agents/skills/everything-ai default.

skill_md_fix.bug: Workflow step 3 said 'use general defaults' with no definition. Agents stalled or guessed.
skill_md_fix.fix: Added ## Safe Defaults section (narrowest scope, reversible first, non-expert assumption, plain language). Replaced 'use general defaults' with concrete domain tiebreaker + 'apply safe defaults'.

evidence.note: Both models show scope_inference and safe_defaults scoring LOWER with skill ON than OFF — structural regression, not noise.

gpt-5.5.interpretation: trace_completeness gain (+0.375) offset scope_inference/safe_defaults loss. Net positive. gpt-5.5 is resilient enough to absorb the PLUGIN_DATA regression.

gpt-5.4-mini.interpretation: Every non-neutral metric regressed. No offset gains. Without memory context, mini cannot infer scope, apply defaults, or structure reports. PLUGIN_DATA silenced the hook on every prompt.

diagnostic_fingerprint: skill_off outperforms skill_on on scope_inference and safe_defaults across BOTH models. Unique to context-dependent metrics. Memory-independent metrics (risk_stop, memory_safety) hold at ceiling — confirming the bug is specifically in context injection, not the skill logic.

confirmed_v0_4_1.note: Retest complete (n=40, gpt-5.4-mini only). First run failed transiently; second run confirmed. gpt-5.5 not re-run in v0.4.1.
confirmed_v0_4_1.gpt-5.4-mini_actual: off 88.2% → on 90.8% → +2.6 pts overall. Recovery of +13.1 pts from v0.4.0 bugged baseline of -10.5.
confirmed_v0_4_1.gpt-5.5_actual: Not retested. v0.4.0 result (+3.9 pts) stands as the current reference.

commits.skill_md_fix: Add ## Safe Defaults section to SKILL.md; replace vague 'use general defaults'
